en.extract:
The black-hooded laughingthrush (Garrulax milleti) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is found in Laos and Vietnam. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''black-hooded laughingthrush''' ('''''Garrulax milleti''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Leiothrichidae]]. It is found in [[Laos]] and [[Vietnam]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

zh.extract:
黑冠噪鹛（学名：Garrulax milleti），是画眉科噪鹛属的一种，分布于老挝和越南。该物种的保护状况被评为近危。
黑冠噪鹛的栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林和亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。
